summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Buy This Print feature for blog posts. All 17 backend tests passed (100%) and all 10 frontend UI tests passed (100%). The feature allows readers to click 'Buy This Print' on images in blog posts, select print type (paper/canvas/metal) and size, and proceed to Stripe checkout.

issues: Initial Total shows $0 before size selection - minor UX issue, could auto-select first size

backend: GET /api/prints/pricing returns 200 with all print types
Pricing contains paper, canvas, metal types with correct values
Type names returned correctly (Fine Art Paper Print, Canvas Wall Art, Metal Print)
Post has valid image_url for print purchase
POST /api/prints/checkout with valid paper order returns checkout_url
POST /api/prints/checkout with valid canvas order works
POST /api/prints/checkout with valid metal order works
Checkout returns session_id for status tracking
frontend: Post title and date displayed correctly
Buy This Print button visible for posts with available_for_purchase=true
Clicking Buy This Print opens print selection modal
Modal shows all print type options (paper, canvas, metal)
Modal shows size options with correct prices
Selecting type/size updates Total price correctly
Buy Print button enabled after size selection
Checkout redirects to Stripe with correct product info

context_for_next_testing_agent: The Buy This Print feature is fully functional. Test post 'like-a-dream' has available_for_purchase=true and can be used for testing. The print modal uses /api/prints/pricing for pricing data and /api/prints/checkout for Stripe checkout. All print types (paper, canvas, metal) and their respective sizes work correctly.
